infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: SafeRoute uses your location to pinpoint pothole locations and send it to emergency services during SOS.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: SafeRoute monitors your location in the background to detect accidents and stationary periods for automatic SOS.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: SafeRoute needs camera access to photograph potholes for reporting.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: SafeRoute needs gallery access to attach photos to pothole reports.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: SafeRoute does not use the microphone directly.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: SafeRoute monitors location for accident detection and automatic SOS.

plugins.cameraPermission: SafeRoute uses the camera to photograph potholes.
